metadata.name: forecastflow
classifiers: License :: OSI Approved :: Apache Software License

functions.name: forecastflow._storage.download
documentation:
Download file.

Args:
    file:
        IO object

    uri:
        URI for storage

    id_token:
        Firebase id-token

functions.name: forecastflow._storage.upload
documentation:
Upload file.

Args:
    file:
        IO object or path to file

    uri:
        URI for storage

    id_token:
        Firebase id-token

classes.name: forecastflow.user.User

methods.name: forecastflow.user.User.__init__
documentation:
Instantiate object with e-mail and password.

Args:
    email (str): E-mail to sign in.
    password (str): password for sign in.

methods.name: forecastflow.user.User.get_project
documentation:
Get project with given pid.

Args:
    project_id:
        Project ID you want to open.

Returns:
    ForecastFlow Project object with given pid.

methods.name: forecastflow.user.User.list_teams
documentation:
List teams belong to the user.

Returns:
    List of teams as a type List[dict].

methods.name: forecastflow.user.User.list_projects
documentation:
List projects with a given team id.

Args:
    team_id (str): team id to fetch related projects.
    current_page (int, optional): Current page number defaults to 1.
    items_per_page (int, optional): Number of items per page defaults to 50.
    order_type (str, optional): Specify asc or desc to order returned projects defaults to asc.

Returns:
    List of projects data as a type List[dict].

methods.name: forecastflow.user.User.id_token
documentation: This method refreshes a ID token if expired.
ForecastFlow user class

classes.name: forecastflow.satellite.tableau.prep.type.PrepType
documentation: Column type for Tableau Prep.

functions.name: forecastflow.satellite.tableau.prep.schema.make_prediction_schema
documentation:
Make schema for Tableau Prep's get_output_schema function for prediction

Args:
    user:
        ForecastFlow User object

    project_id:
        ForecastFlow Project ID

    model_id:
        ForecastFlow Model ID

Returns:
    A function which returns a schema for Tableau Prep.

functions.name: forecastflow.satellite.google.cloud.storage.import_data_source
documentation:
Import data-source from given Cloud Storage URIs.

Args:
    uri:
        Cloud Storage URIs.
        e.g.) gs://bucket-name/foo/bar.parquet

    project:
        ForecastFlow Project object.

    name:
        Name of data source.

    label:
        Label of data.

    filetype:
        Data file format.

    description:
        Description of data source.

    skip_profile:
        If True, skip profiling.

    client:
        Cloud Storage client to access URI.             If not passed, use default credential.

Returns:
    New data source imported.

functions.name: forecastflow.satellite.google.cloud.storage.export_prediction
documentation:
Export prediction to given Cloud Storage URI.

Args:
    prediction:
        ForecastFlow Prediction object.

    uri_prefix:
        Prefix of Cloud Storage URIs. If uri_prefix is             "gs://bucket-name/foo/", upload parquet filetype prediction to             "gs://bucket-name/foo/000000000000.parquet",             "gs://bucket-name/foo/000000000001.parquet", ...

    client:
        Cloud Storage client to export prediction.             If not passed, use default credential.

functions.name: forecastflow._auth.sign_in_with_password
documentation:
Sign in with e-mail and password by using firebase REST API.
Document is here https://firebase.google.com/docs/reference/rest/auth/#section-sign-in-email-password .

Args:
    email:
        User's e-mail to sign in.

    password:
        Password for sign in.

Returns:
    Dictionary object. keys = ['kind',
        'localId', 'email', 'displayName', 'idToken', 'registered', 'refreshToken', 'expiresIn']

functions.name: forecastflow._auth.refresh_id_token
documentation:
Refresh a ID token by using refresh token.
Document is here https://firebase.google.com/docs/reference/rest/auth/#section-refresh-token .

Args:
    refresh_token:
        A Firebase Auth refresh token

Returns:
    Dictionary. keys = ['access_token', 'expires_in', 'token_type', 'refresh_token',
        'id_token, 'user_id', 'project_id']

classes.name: forecastflow.data_source.DataSource

methods.name: forecastflow.data_source.DataSource.__init__
documentation:
Instantiate object with given data source ID

Args:
    project:
        Project which data source belong to.

    data_source_id:
        ID of data source you want to open.

methods.name: forecastflow.data_source.DataSource.update
documentation: Update name, status

methods.name: forecastflow.data_source.DataSource.wait_until_done
documentation: Wait until ForecastFlow finish profiling.

methods.name: forecastflow.data_source.DataSource.create_model
documentation:
Train model with this datasource.

Args:
    train_settings:
        Object of ClassifierTrainingSettings or RegressorTrainingSettings

    name:
        Name of model.

    test_frac:
        Fraction of rows in train that will belong to the test.
        Round off to two decimal places.

    test_data_source:
        Data to test with.

    description:
        Description of model.

Returns:
    ForecastFlow model object.
ForecastFlow data source class

classes.name: forecastflow.training.TrainingSettings
documentation: Base class for TrainingSettings

classes.name: forecastflow.training.ClassifierTrainingSettings
documentation:
Classifier training settings

Args:
    target:
        Name of the column which should be predicted
    metric:
        forecastflow.enums.ClassificationMetrics object
    primary_id:
        Name of the primary ID column
    secondary_ids:
        Names list of the secondary ID columns
    feature_excludes:
        Names list of excluded columns
    random_state:
        Seed to the random generator

classes.name: forecastflow.training.RegressorTrainingSettings
documentation:
Regressor training settings

Args:
    target:
        Name of the column which should be predicted
    metric:
        forecastflow.enums.RegressionMetrics object
    primary_id:
        Name of the primary ID column
    secondary_ids:
        Names list of the secondary ID columns
    feature_excludes:
        Names list of excluded columns
    random_state:
        Seed to the random generator

classes.name: forecastflow.exceptions.ForecastFlowError
documentation: Base Exception of ForecastFlow

classes.name: forecastflow.exceptions.InvalidID
documentation: ID is not found or invalid.

classes.name: forecastflow.exceptions.OperationFailed
documentation: Data Source, Model or Prediction quit with Error.

classes.name: forecastflow.model.Model

methods.name: forecastflow.model.Model.__init__
documentation:
Instantiate object with given model ID.

Args:
    project:
        Project which model belong to.

    model_id:
        ID of model you want to open.

methods.name: forecastflow.model.Model._document
documentation:
Returns:
    A document of this model on database

methods.name: forecastflow.model.Model.prediction_schema
documentation:
Returns:
    OrderedDict which maps column name to type string like 'float'.

Notes:
    You want to use forecastflow.util.parse_type if you need native Python type.

methods.name: forecastflow.model.Model.create_prediction
documentation:
Create prediction with data_source.

Args:
    data_source:
        Data to predict with.

    name:
        Name of predict.

    description:
        Description of predict.

Returns:
    ForecastFlow prediction object which predicts with given data.

methods.name: forecastflow.model.Model.get_prediction
documentation:
Get prediction object with given ID.

Args:
    prediction_id:
        ID of predict you want.
Returns:
    ForecastFlow predict object with given ID.

methods.name: forecastflow.model.Model.get_importances
documentation:
Get prediction object with given ID.
Returns:
    ForecastFlow predict object with given ID.

methods.name: forecastflow.model.Model.delete
documentation:
Delete model itself.

Args:
    No arguments for this method.

Returnes:
    None: Nothing to return if process finished successfully.

Raises:
    If deletion process failed with some reason,
    it raises OperationFailed exception.

methods.name: forecastflow.model.Model.update
documentation: Update name, status, target and features

methods.name: forecastflow.model.Model.wait_until_done
documentation: Wait until ForecastFlow finish training.
ForecastFlow model object

functions.name: forecastflow.util.parse_type
documentation:
Parse type string to python type.
Use this function to parse type in schema.

Args:
    type_str:
        Type string like 'float', 'int', ...
Returns:
    Python native type

documentation:
Returns:
    True if expired
Manage expiration

classes.name: forecastflow.project.Project

methods.name: forecastflow.project.Project.__init__
documentation:
Instantiate Project object with given project ID

Args:
    user:
        Owner of project.

    project_id:
        Project ID you want to open.

methods.name: forecastflow.project.Project.create_data_source
documentation:
Upload file to ForecastFlow and create data source.

Args:
    data:
        pandas.DataFrame or list of files to upload.

    name:
        Name of data source.

    label:
        Label of data.

    description:
        Description of data source.

    filetype:
        Data file format

Returns:
    New data source created.

methods.name: forecastflow.project.Project.get_data_source
documentation:
Get data source with given data source id.

Args:
    data_source_id:
        ID of data source you want to open.

Returns:
    ForecastFlow data source object with given data source ID.

methods.name: forecastflow.project.Project.list_data_sources
documentation:
List data sources with given page settings.

Args:
    label_to_filter (DataSourceLabel, optional): Label type filtering data sources
    current_page (int): Current page number fetching data sources
    items_per_page (int): Number of returning items per page
    order_type (str): asc or desc to order items by created date

Returns:
    A dict object that has list of data sources and pagination info.

methods.name: forecastflow.project.Project.list_models
documentation: List models with given page settings

methods.name: forecastflow.project.Project.get_model
documentation:
Get model with given model ID.

Args:
    model_id:
        ID of model you want to open.

Returns:
    ForecastFlow model object with given model ID.

methods.name: forecastflow.project.Project.delete_data_sources_unused_for_training
documentation:
Delete data sources which is not used for training or testing

Args:
    data_source_ids (list[str]): dids to delete data sources.
    with_prediction (bool): Whether delete related predictions or not.

Returns:
    None: Nothing to return if process finished successfully.

Raises:
    If deletion process failed with some reason,
    it raises OperationFailed exception.
ForecastFlow project class

methods.name: forecastflow.prediction.Prediction.__init__

methods.name: forecastflow.prediction.Prediction.wait_until_done
documentation: Wait until ForecastFlow finish prediction.

methods.name: forecastflow.prediction.Prediction.delete_data_source_unused_for_training
documentation:
Delete data source which is used only for the prediction.

Args:
    with_prediction (bool): Whether delete prediction itself.

Returns:
    None: Nothing to return if process finished successfully

Raises:
    If deletion process failed with some reason,
    it raises OperationFailed exception.

methods.name: forecastflow.prediction.Prediction.delete_prediction
documentation:
Delete prediction itself.

Args:
    no arguments for this method.

Returns:
    None: Nothing to return if process finished successfully

Raises:
    If deletion process failed with some reason,
    it raises OperationFailed exception.
ForecastFlow prediction object

documentation:
Create data source in project.
NOTE: This function doesn't create profile.

documentation: Create data source and profile from file

Get data-source info.

Args:

    pid: Project ID.
    did: DataSource ID.

documentation:
Get model info.

Args:

    pid: Project ID.

Get model importances info.

Get prediction info.

Get project info.

functions.name: forecastflow.api._v3.list_teams_info
documentation:
Fetch list of teams from server.

Args:
    id_token (str): ID token used for authorization.

Returns:
    List of teams belong to authorized user.

functions.name: forecastflow.api._v3.list_projects_info
documentation:
Fetch list of projects from server.

Args:
    id_token (str): id token used for authorization
    team_id (str, optional): ForecastFlow team ID
    current_page (int): Current page number
    items_per_page (int): Number of items per page
    order_type (str): asc or desc to order items by created date

Returns:
    List of projects and pagination info.

functions.name: forecastflow.api._v3.list_data_sources_info
documentation:
Fetch list of data sources from server.

Args:
    id_token (str): id token used for authorization
    team_id (str, optional): ForecastFlow team ID
    pid (str): ForecastFlow project ID
    label_to_filter (DataSourceLabel, optional): Label type filtering data sources
    current_page (int): Current page number
    items_per_page (int): Number of items per page
    order_type (str): asc or desc to order items by created date

Returns:
    List of data sources and pagination info.

functions.name: forecastflow.api._v3.list_models_info
documentation:
Fetch list of models from server.

Args:
    id_token (str): id token used for authorization
    team_id (str, optional): ForecastFlow team ID
    pid (str): ForecastFlow project ID
    current_page (int): Current page number
    items_per_page (int): Number of items per page
    order_type (str): asc or desc to order items by created date

Returns:
    List of models and pagination info.
